TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cen-kang-sen, SBS, MBE, PMW "kamu nu Ing, Jackie Chan, 1954 a mihca 4 a bulad 7 a demiad", nganngan ci Bang-s-lung, hayyu a ngangan ci Cen-lung,yen-low, tuas a luma' ayzaay a An-buy-hu-bu, syang-kang paingiay a tatama, mudadiway, paigiay, misulit tu saigaan atu misaigaay. ťô≥śłĮÁĒü,SBS,MBE,PMW(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Jackie Chan,1954ŚĻī4śúą7śó•‚ÄĒ), . nilaculan 1979 a mihcaan mikadum tu cya-he kusi, u bahel kabelec ni Li-syaw-lung, kapah ku nisangaan. 1998 a mihcaan zayhan u belec ni He-kwan-cang pacena' miliyas tu cya-he. uyza mihcaan tu sazikuzay, makay cya-he sakapu palekalay ci Cuw-wen-hway a nitakus patiku misaigang tu "pow-li cun" atu "te-u-mi-cen". 2001 a mihcaan saayaway mikadum tu ing-hwang sakaput katukuh ayza. u kasingangan ni Cen-lung u pakatawaay a iga, u kamu sakakapah a zihen u uzip tu ku miigiay, i haw-lay-u atu kanatalan u malekuay nu misaigiay nu Cung-hwa-min-kow a tdemaw, yadah ku nisaingaan mahiniay hwe-pin-s-su" i kitaki u malaheciay talakaway a paya. 2015 a mihcaan, "bu-pi-s" piazih tu aca nu nilacul pakala tu 3.5 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw. 2016 a mihcaan, ci Cen-lung i kitakitay u sakatusa nu misaigiay a tatama nu talakaway a micumud a kalisiw, uyza a mihca mala u saayaway pakalaay tu aw-se-ka tahadaucay a kawlah nu Cung-hwa-min-kow a tademaw. 2015ŚĻī,"ŚĮĆśĮĒŚ£ę" . misaigi a kawawnay, ci Ce-lung sibalucu' miedapay a kawaw. 2004 a mihcaan mala situngusay tu lyen-he-kow mulaay ci-cin-hut miedapay a tademaw.2006 a mihcaan maala tu "bu-pi-s u kapahay baluc' miedapay tu pakuyucay nu kitakit. 2009 a mihcaan. takusan nu Cowng-kow ci Ce-lung mala misingdingay tu mitena'ay tu ledek a tademaw. . ci Cen-lung i 1992-1993 a mihcaan u kungku nu taylin III tadaicelangay a taylin, cung-an-cu pakala tu saka29-30 lekad cin-ma a kawlah tu sakapahay a tatapangan, mala u cin-ma kawlah igaan nu saayaway lalid sanay a ing-ti. Cen-kang-sen sa nau ngangan ni Cen-lung, lecuh i Syang-kang tay-pin-san. Ba ng-taw-lung ku ama 1915 a mihcaan lecuh i San-tung, i 9 wiw tayza i A-wi kuwan he-syen-sen-kang-cen "ayza tungus tuu-hu kuwan ciw kitizaan" balaki, nai An huy malaacawa, tusa ku wawa ci bang-s-te bang-s-sen, 1947 a mihcaan tataytay tayza i Sya-kang palahad, naiAmilika cu-kang-lin-s-kwan misahemayay atu malakuli a kawaw,makay winaay ku ngangan "bayi ni Cen-lung misumad tu ngangan Cen-ce-pin", i Sya-kang siacawa aca tu zuma ci Cen-ye-lung. 2013 a mihca 8 a bulad 31 a demiad, tayza I Sen-kang-cen, atu padek ina a calekaka masasutineng, sumad tu Nganga Bang-s-lung han. acawa ni Cen-lung ci Lin-bung-cyaw, siwawa ku heni ci Bang-ci-minan, na u Cen. 2001 a mkihcaan , ci Cen-lung matineng tu kitizaan nju wama ci Bang-taw-lung i San-tung ku luma' nu tuas, ngangan Bang. 2003 a mihcaan tuas a ngangan sumad han tu Bang. Nisainaan aw-ci a ngangan ci Ten-pi-yin atu bung-hwang tatayna. zuma satu Cen-lung aci U-ci-li siwaw tu cacay tatayna ci U-cow-lin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶…ôn-kaŇč-s…ôn, sbs, mb…ô, pmw "kamu nu iŇč, *a ¶ki…ô ¶ńßan, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", ŇčanŇčan ¶i baŇč-s-r~…ĺuŇč, ńßajju a ŇčaŇčan ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč,j…ôn-r~…ĺow, tuas a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ajzaaj a an-buj-ńßu-bu, sjaŇč-kaŇč paiŇčiaj a tatama, mudadiwaj, paigiaj, misur~…ĺit tu saigaan atu misaigaaj. ***,sbs,mb…ô,pmw(**:*a ¶ki…ô ¶ńßan,**********), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** a mińß ¶aan mikadum tu ¶ja-ńß…ô kusi, u bańß…ôr~…ĺ kab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ni r~…ĺi-sjaw-r~…ĺuŇč, kapańß ku nisaŇčaan. **** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan u b…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ni ńß…ô-kwan- ¶aŇč pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° mir~…ĺijas tu ¶ja-ńß…ô. ujza mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj, makaj ¶ja-ńß…ô sakapu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj ¶i ¶uw-w…ôn-ńßwaj a nitakus patiku misaigaŇč tu "pow-r~…ĺi ¶un" atu "t…ô-u-mi- ¶…ôn". **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj mikadum tu iŇč-ńßwaŇč sakaput katukuńß ajza. u kasiŇčaŇčan ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč u pakatawaaj a iga, u kamu sakakapańß a zińß…ôn u uzip tu ku miigiaj, i ńßaw-r~…ĺaj-u atu kanatar~…ĺan u mar~…ĺ…ôkuaj nu misaigiaj nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow a td…ômaw, jadańß ku nisaiŇčaan mańßiniaj ńßw…ô-pin-s-su" i kitaki u mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj tar~…ĺakawaj a paja. **** a mińß ¶aan, "bu-pi-s" piazińß tu a ¶a nu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *.* war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč i kitakitaj u sakatusa nu misaigiaj a tatama nu tar~…ĺakawaj a mi ¶umud a kar~…ĺisiw, ujza a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺa u saajawaj pakar~…ĺaaj tu aw-s…ô-ka tańßadau ¶aj a kawr~…ĺańß nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow a tad…ômaw. *****,"***" . misaigi a kawawnaj, ¶i ¶…ô-r~…ĺuŇč sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mi…ôdapaj a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa situŇčusaj tu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-kow mur~…ĺaaj ¶i- ¶in-ńßut mi…ôdapaj a tad…ômaw.**** a mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa tu "bu-pi-s u kapańßaj bar~…ĺu ¶ Ē~ ° mi…ôdapaj tu pakuju ¶aj nu kitakit. **** a mińß ¶aan. takusan nu ¶owŇč-kow ¶i ¶…ô-r~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺa misiŇčdiŇčaj tu mit…ôna Ē~ °aj tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a tad…ômaw. . ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč i ****-**** a mińß ¶aan u kuŇčku nu tajr~…ĺin iii tadai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tajr~…ĺin, ¶uŇč-an- ¶u pakar~…ĺa tu saka**-** r~…ĺ…ôkad ¶in-ma a kawr~…ĺańß tu sakapańßaj a tatapaŇčan, mar~…ĺa u ¶in-ma kawr~…ĺańß igaan nu saajawaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj a iŇč-ti. ¶…ôn-kaŇč-s…ôn sa nau ŇčaŇčan ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i sjaŇč-kaŇč taj-pin-san. ba Ňč-taw-r~…ĺuŇč ku ama **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i san-tuŇč, i * wiw tajza i a-wi kuwan ńß…ô-sj…ôn-s…ôn-kaŇč- ¶…ôn "ajza tuŇčus tuu-ńßu kuwan ¶iw kitizaan" bar~…ĺaki, nai an ńßuj mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, tusa ku wawa ¶i baŇč-s-t…ô baŇč-s-s…ôn, **** a mińß ¶aan tatajtaj tajza i sja-kaŇč par~…ĺańßad, naiamir~…ĺika ¶u-kaŇč-r~…ĺin-s-kwan misańß…ômajaj atu mar~…ĺakur~…ĺi a kawaw,makaj winaaj ku ŇčaŇčan "baji ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč misumad tu ŇčaŇčan ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-pin", i sja-kaŇč sia ¶awa a ¶a tu zuma ¶i ¶…ôn-j…ô-r~…ĺuŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tajza i s…ôn-kaŇč- ¶…ôn, atu pad…ôk ina a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkaka masasutin…ôŇč, sumad tu ŇčaŇča baŇč-s-r~…ĺuŇč ńßan. a ¶awa ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč ¶i r~…ĺin-buŇč- ¶jaw, siwawa ku ńß…ôni ¶i baŇč- ¶i-minan, na u ¶…ôn. **** a mkińß ¶aan , ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč matin…ôŇč tu kitizaan nju wama ¶i baŇč-taw-r~…ĺuŇč i san-tuŇč ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tuas, ŇčaŇčan baŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan tuas a ŇčaŇčan sumad ńßan tu baŇč. nisainaan aw- ¶i a ŇčaŇčan ¶i t…ôn-pi-jin atu buŇč-ńßwaŇč tatajna. zuma satu ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč a ¶i u- ¶i-r~…ĺi siwaw tu ¶a ¶aj tatajna ¶i u- ¶ow-r~…ĺin. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cen-kang-sen, SBS, MBE, PMW "kamu nu Ing, Jackie Chan, 1954 a mihca 4 a bulad 7 a demiad", nganngan ci Bang-s-lung, hayyu a ngangan ci Cen-lung,yen-low, tuas a luma' ayzaay a An-buy-hu-bu, syang-kang paingiay a tatama, mudadiway, paigiay, misulit tu saigaan atu misaigaay. ťô≥śłĮÁĒü,SBS,MBE,PMW(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Jackie Chan,1954ŚĻī4śúą7śó•‚ÄĒ), . nilaculan 1979 a mihcaan mikadum tu cya-he kusi, u bahel kabelec ni Li-syaw-lung, kapah ku nisangaan. 1998 a mihcaan zayhan u belec ni He-kwan-cang pacena' miliyas tu cya-he. uyza mihcaan tu sazikuzay, makay cya-he sakapu palekalay ci Cuw-wen-hway a nitakus patiku misaigang tu "pow-li cun" atu "te-u-mi-cen". 2001 a mihcaan saayaway mikadum tu ing-hwang sakaput katukuh ayza. u kasingangan ni Cen-lung u pakatawaay a iga, u kamu sakakapah a zihen u uzip tu ku miigiay, i haw-lay-u atu kanatalan u malekuay nu misaigiay nu Cung-hwa-min-kow a tdemaw, yadah ku nisaingaan mahiniay hwe-pin-s-su" i kitaki u malaheciay talakaway a paya. 2015 a mihcaan, "bu-pi-s" piazih tu aca nu nilacul pakala tu 3.5 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw. 2016 a mihcaan, ci Cen-lung i kitakitay u sakatusa nu misaigiay a tatama nu talakaway a micumud a kalisiw, uyza a mihca mala u saayaway pakalaay tu aw-se-ka tahadaucay a kawlah nu Cung-hwa-min-kow a tademaw. 2015ŚĻī,"ŚĮĆśĮĒŚ£ę" . misaigi a kawawnay, ci Ce-lung sibalucu' miedapay a kawaw. 2004 a mihcaan mala situngusay tu lyen-he-kow mulaay ci-cin-hut miedapay a tademaw.2006 a mihcaan maala tu "bu-pi-s u kapahay baluc' miedapay tu pakuyucay nu kitakit. 2009 a mihcaan. takusan nu Cowng-kow ci Ce-lung mala misingdingay tu mitena'ay tu ledek a tademaw. . ci Cen-lung i 1992-1993 a mihcaan u kungku nu taylin III tadaicelangay a taylin, cung-an-cu pakala tu saka29-30 lekad cin-ma a kawlah tu sakapahay a tatapangan, mala u cin-ma kawlah igaan nu saayaway lalid sanay a ing-ti. Cen-kang-sen sa nau ngangan ni Cen-lung, lecuh i Syang-kang tay-pin-san. Ba ng-taw-lung ku ama 1915 a mihcaan lecuh i San-tung, i 9 wiw tayza i A-wi kuwan he-syen-sen-kang-cen "ayza tungus tuu-hu kuwan ciw kitizaan" balaki, nai An huy malaacawa, tusa ku wawa ci bang-s-te bang-s-sen, 1947 a mihcaan tataytay tayza i Sya-kang palahad, naiAmilika cu-kang-lin-s-kwan misahemayay atu malakuli a kawaw,makay winaay ku ngangan "bayi ni Cen-lung misumad tu ngangan Cen-ce-pin", i Sya-kang siacawa aca tu zuma ci Cen-ye-lung. 2013 a mihca 8 a bulad 31 a demiad, tayza I Sen-kang-cen, atu padek ina a calekaka masasutineng, sumad tu Nganga Bang-s-lung han. acawa ni Cen-lung ci Lin-bung-cyaw, siwawa ku heni ci Bang-ci-minan, na u Cen. 2001 a mkihcaan , ci Cen-lung matineng tu kitizaan nju wama ci Bang-taw-lung i San-tung ku luma' nu tuas, ngangan Bang. 2003 a mihcaan tuas a ngangan sumad han tu Bang. Nisainaan aw-ci a ngangan ci Ten-pi-yin atu bung-hwang tatayna. zuma satu Cen-lung aci U-ci-li siwaw tu cacay tatayna ci U-cow-lin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč,j…ôn-r~…ĺow, tuas a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ajzaaj a an-buj-ńßu-bu, sjaŇč-kaŇč paiŇčiaj a tatama, mudadiwaj, paigiaj, misur~…ĺit tu saigaan atu misaigaaj. ***,sbs,mb…ô,pmw(**:*a ¶ki…ô ¶ńßan,**********), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** a mińß ¶aan mikadum tu ¶ja-ńß…ô kusi, u bańß…ôr~…ĺ kab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ni r~…ĺi-sjaw-r~…ĺuŇč, kapańß ku nisaŇčaan. **** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan u b…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ni ńß…ô-kwan- ¶aŇč pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° mir~…ĺijas tu ¶ja-ńß…ô. ujza mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj, makaj ¶ja-ńß…ô sakapu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj ¶i ¶uw-w…ôn-ńßwaj a nitakus patiku misaigaŇč tu "pow-r~…ĺi ¶un" atu "t…ô-u-mi- ¶…ôn". **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj mikadum tu iŇč-ńßwaŇč sakaput katukuńß ajza. u kasiŇčaŇčan ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč u pakatawaaj a iga, u kamu sakakapańß a zińß…ôn u uzip tu ku miigiaj, i ńßaw-r~…ĺaj-u atu kanatar~…ĺan u mar~…ĺ…ôkuaj nu misaigiaj nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow a td…ômaw, jadańß ku nisaiŇčaan mańßiniaj ńßw…ô-pin-s-su" i kitaki u mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj tar~…ĺakawaj a paja. **** a mińß ¶aan, "bu-pi-s" piazińß tu a ¶a nu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *.* war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč i kitakitaj u sakatusa nu misaigiaj a tatama nu tar~…ĺakawaj a mi ¶umud a kar~…ĺisiw, ujza a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺa u saajawaj pakar~…ĺaaj tu aw-s…ô-ka tańßadau ¶aj a kawr~…ĺańß nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow a tad…ômaw. *****,"***" . misaigi a kawawnaj, ¶i ¶…ô-r~…ĺuŇč sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mi…ôdapaj a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa situŇčusaj tu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-kow mur~…ĺaaj ¶i- ¶in-ńßut mi…ôdapaj a tad…ômaw.**** a mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa tu "bu-pi-s u kapańßaj bar~…ĺu ¶ Ē~ ° mi…ôdapaj tu pakuju ¶aj nu kitakit. **** a mińß ¶aan. takusan nu ¶owŇč-kow ¶i ¶…ô-r~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺa misiŇčdiŇčaj tu mit…ôna Ē~ °aj tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a tad…ômaw. . ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč i ****-**** a mińß ¶aan u kuŇčku nu tajr~…ĺin iii tadai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tajr~…ĺin, ¶uŇč-an- ¶u pakar~…ĺa tu saka**-** r~…ĺ…ôkad ¶in-ma a kawr~…ĺańß tu sakapańßaj a tatapaŇčan, mar~…ĺa u ¶in-ma kawr~…ĺańß igaan nu saajawaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj a iŇč-ti. ¶…ôn-kaŇč-s…ôn sa nau ŇčaŇčan ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i sjaŇč-kaŇč taj-pin-san. ba Ňč-taw-r~…ĺuŇč ku ama **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i san-tuŇč, i * wiw tajza i a-wi kuwan ńß…ô-sj…ôn-s…ôn-kaŇč- ¶…ôn "ajza tuŇčus tuu-ńßu kuwan ¶iw kitizaan" bar~…ĺaki, nai an ńßuj mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, tusa ku wawa ¶i baŇč-s-t…ô baŇč-s-s…ôn, **** a mińß ¶aan tatajtaj tajza i sja-kaŇč par~…ĺańßad, naiamir~…ĺika ¶u-kaŇč-r~…ĺin-s-kwan misańß…ômajaj atu mar~…ĺakur~…ĺi a kawaw,makaj winaaj ku ŇčaŇčan "baji ni ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč misumad tu ŇčaŇčan ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-pin", i sja-kaŇč sia ¶awa a ¶a tu r~…ĺin-buŇč- ¶jaw, siwawa ku ńß…ôni ¶i baŇč- ¶i-minan, na u ¶…ôn. **** a mkińß ¶aan , ¶i ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč matin…ôŇč tu kitizaan nju wama ¶i baŇč-taw-r~…ĺuŇč i san-tuŇč ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tuas, ŇčaŇčan baŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan tuas a ŇčaŇčan sumad ńßan tu baŇč. nisainaan aw- ¶i a ŇčaŇčan ¶i t…ôn-pi-jin atu buŇč-ńßwaŇč tatajna. zuma satu ¶…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč a ¶i u- ¶i-r~…ĺi siwaw tu ¶a ¶aj tatajna ¶i u- ¶ow-r~…ĺin. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
